## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened? Paste any error messages from **Output → Zerly AI**.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste the relevant logs.

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **VS Code version:** [e.g. 1.89.0]
- **Zerly AI version:** [e.g. 0.1.0]
- **Node.js version (if running backend):** [e.g. 18.20.0]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
